featureName: BUG-021-005: relationship-cooling decision must be LLM-driven, not hardcoded magic-number thresholds
reporter: owner directive (no const limits; LLM decides per situation)

executionHistory.summary: Owner directive: 'there should be NO const limits; all should be decided by LLM depending on situation'. Grounded against docs/smackerel.md §3.6 (domain reasoning is LLM-driven, not rule-driven) and the constitution C8/NO-DEFAULTS SST boundary. The relationship-cooling producer encoded the cooling judgment as hardcoded SQL magic numbers, and BUG-021-004 cemented them as Go constants + a lock test. Mapped the existing LLM machinery: agent.Bridge + scenario prompt contracts + the annotation_classify precedent (which replaced a hardcoded interactionMap literal with an LLM scenario).

Single bugfix-fastlane scope superseding BUG-021-004: new relationship_cooling_evaluate scenario + BridgeCoolingEvaluator (mockable) routing the cooling judgment to the LLM; producer retrieves candidate signals only; operational bounds (cap, confidence floor, dedup window) moved to fail-loud SST; remove BUG-021-004 constants + builder + lock test. SCN-021-COOLING-LLM-01..03 authored.

Created config/prompt_contracts/relationship-cooling-evaluate-v1.yaml (per-situation judgment, input/output schema, noop tool). internal/intelligence/cooling.go: CoolingCandidate/Decision, CoolingEvaluator + BridgeCoolingEvaluator, CoolingConfig, pure helpers, noop tool init(). Engine gained a cooling field + SetCoolingConfig. Reworked ProduceRelationshipCoolingAlerts to retrieve candidate signals (no business threshold) and let the LLM judge each, gating only on the operational confidence floor; graceful skip when evaluator nil. SST: intelligence.relationship_cooling.* keys (smackerel.yaml + config.sh + internal/config/relationship_cooling.go). Wiring: cmd/core/wiring_cooling.go + main.go call. Removed BUG-021-004 constants + relationshipCoolingAlertQuery() + the lock test.

cooling_test.go: scripted coolingBridgeRunner proves the LLM-driven path (parse, scenario routing, signal forwarding, PersonID non-leak, all error paths) + pure helpers. relationship_cooling_test.go: SST loader populate + fail-loud + range rejection. scenario-lint registers the new scenario (0 new rejects); agent loader + TestSpec061_LivePromptContractsLoadCleanly green. go build ./... + vet green.

Full intelligence + config + scheduler + cmd/core + scenario-lint + agent packages green. ./smackerel.sh config generate resolves the new operational keys into dev.env (config-validate OK). The removed lock test no longer cements magic numbers.
Reused the annotation_classify bridge pattern; extracted two small pure helpers (typical-gap math, surface gate) for testability; no new abstractions beyond the evaluator.

Candidates are collected before any LLM call (no DB cursor held during Invoke); context cancellation honored mid-loop; the scenario carries operational LLM-call bounds (timeout_ms, token_budget). Nil-evaluator path degrades gracefully.

The internal PersonID is json:"-" and proven (by test) not to enter the LLM envelope; only name + numeric signals are sent. The candidate query is parameterized (no SQL injection). No secret/auth surface. No framework files touched.
artifact-lint PASSED for the packet; config generate + build + vet + affected packages green. Evidence in report.md.

No hardcoded cooling threshold remains (grep of coolingMinPriorInteractions / relationshipCoolingAlertQuery = 0). No migration; generated env gitignored; no .github/bubbles changes; parent spec 021 planning artifacts untouched. BUG-021-004 superseded (its lock test removed).

Scenario YAML, cooling.go, smackerel.yaml, and wiring_cooling.go document the LLM-driven judgment and the operational/business boundary. The bug packet records the supersession of BUG-021-004 and flags the sibling digest/recommendation threshold debt as follow-up.

lockdownState.reason: bugfix-fastlane LLM-driven rework; no convergence loop required

resolvedFindings.summary: The relationship-cooling judgment was hardcoded SQL magic numbers (>30 days, >=4 in a fixed 90-180 day window, LIMIT 10); BUG-021-004 cemented them as Go constants + a lock test, contradicting docs/smackerel.md §3.6 (domain reasoning must be LLM-driven).
resolvedFindings.resolution: Moved the cooling judgment to the relationship_cooling_evaluate LLM scenario via BridgeCoolingEvaluator; the producer retrieves candidate signals only; operational bounds moved to fail-loud SST; removed BUG-021-004's constants, query builder, and lock test.
resolvedFindings.evidence: report.md Test/Validation Evidence; internal/intelligence/cooling.go; config/prompt_contracts/relationship-cooling-evaluate-v1.yaml; grep coolingMinPriorInteractions = 0.

discoveredIssues.summary: Sibling hardcoded business thresholds remain in the digest/recommendation/intelligence layers (resurface dormancy 30d + relevance 0.3; hospitality sentiment 0.3 / rating 3.5; expense windows 7d/97d; price-drop 10%). Same class of debt — domain reasoning that should be LLM-driven per docs/smackerel.md §3.6.
